channel.title: Precision on Vectors & Verbs
channel.description: Recent content in Precision on Vectors & Verbs

item.title: The Architecture of Precision: Why Quantization Defines the AI Era
item.description: From FP32 to NF4 — a deep dive into how quantization bridges the gap between trillion-parameter models and the hardware they run on, and why ‘smaller’ is almost always ‘faster’.
